wiki.summary: Get Get Down is a song by American DJ/producer Paul Johnson. It was released in October 1999 as a single from the album, The Groove I Have. "Get Get Down" topped the Billboard Hot Dance/Club Play chart. Outside the United States, the song peaked within the top ten of the charts in Belgium (Wallonia), France, the Netherlands and the United Kingdom. The song would be sampled by Internet personality IShowSpeed, with DJ Shawny providing production. The Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: Get Get Down is a song by American DJ/producer Paul Johnson. It was released in October 1999 as a single from the album, The Groove I Have. "Get Get Down" topped the Billboard Hot Dance/Club Play chart. Outside the United States, the song peaked within the top ten of the charts in Belgium (Wallonia), France, the Netherlands and the United Kingdom. The song would be sampled by Internet personality IShowSpeed, with DJ Shawny providing production. The IShowSpeed version has at least double the streams of the original on streaming sites like Spotify. Read more on Last.fm.
